name: White Bean and Lamb Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 4-quart pot.
2. When hot, add celery, onion, garlic, and sage.
3. Cook until onion is softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add stock or broth and water. Bring to a boil.
5. Add lamb and beans. Bring to boil again.
6. Simmer, covered, for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Use a slotted spoon to remove lamb when cool enough to handle.
8. Remove meat from bone and cut into 1/3-inch dice.
9. Puree 2 cups beans with 1 cup soup liquid until smooth.
10. Return meat and pureed mixture to the pot.
11. Stir well to combine.
12. Add lemon juice and season to taste with salt and pepper.
13. Can be made ahead and refrigerated for up to 3 days or frozen.
14. Reheat gently, thinning with water as needed.
15. Adjust seasoning and lemon juice before serving.
16. Garnish with tomato and basil.
